message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface "Observer" as Observer <<I>> {
  + notify(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class "EntityManager" as EntityManager <<C>> {
  - entities: List<Entity>
  - systems: Set<Observer>
  + subscribe(system: Observer)
  + addEntity(entity: Entity)
  + removeEntity(id: Int)
  - notifySystems(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class "System" as System <<C>> {
  - managedTypes: List<ComponentType>
  - filteredEntities: List<Entity>
  + addEntityRef(): Unit
  + removeEntityRef(): Unit
  + update(): Unit
  - checkEntityISCompatible(): Unit
}

class "Entity" as Entity <<C>> {
  <<Product Type>>
  - ID : Int
  - components : Map<ComponentType,\nComponent>
}

class "Component" as Component <<C>> {
  <<Product Type>>
  - type: ComponentType
}

enum "ComponentType" as ComponentType <<E>> {
  DIRECTION,
  POSITION,
  SPEED,
  SPAWN,
  ...
}

System ..|> Observer

Observer "0..*" o-- EntityManager

EntityManager "1" *-- "0..*" Entity

System "0..*" o-- "0..*" Entity

Entity "1" *-- "0..*" Component

ComponentType "1" *-- Component

note right of Entity
  Module + Case Class
end note

@enduml
```
